title: maesa protracta
intro: Maesa protracta, also known as the yellow mangosteen, is a plant species in the family Sapotaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Maesa protracta include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it has also been used to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Maesa protracta include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
